## 2026-03-31 - Component Localization & ARIA Labels\n**Learning:** When using auto-generated UI components (like shadcn/ui or Lovable generation), generic English text (e.g., "Go to previous page", "Next") and missing ARIA labels on icon-only buttons can degrade the localized experience and screen reader accessibility.\n**Action:** Always review newly generated UI components to ensure their language matches the app's default language (Portuguese) and that all icon-only buttons have descriptive `aria-label` and `title` attributes.
